title: 35 Best Malayalam Films of All Time
description: The golden standard of Indian regional cinema — from Drishyam to All We Imagine as Light.
intro: Malayalam cinema is currently the most exciting film industry in India — possibly the world. Small budgets, real stories, extraordinary craft. This list is your complete guide.

entries.blurb: The perfect thriller. Remade five times. None come close.

film.title: Drishyam
film.verdict: The perfect thriller. Remade five times. None come close.

entries.blurb: Grand Prix at Cannes 2024. Kerala's most internationally acclaimed film.

film.title: All We Imagine as Light
film.verdict: Grand Prix, Cannes 2024. India's greatest recent triumph at the festival.

entries.blurb: The film that defined a generation of Malayalam youth.

film.title: Premam
film.verdict: The film that defined a generation of Malayalam youth.

entries.blurb: Four brothers. One home. Malayalam cinema at its most tender.

film.title: Kumbalangi Nights
film.verdict: Four brothers. One home. Malayalam cinema at its most tender.

entries.blurb: Brotherhood and survival, based on a true story. Unmissable.

film.title: Manjummel Boys
film.verdict: Brotherhood and survival, based on a true story. Unmissable.
